instr: change the dark charcoal suit jacket to a crisp WHITE service waiter jacket; keep the trousers black and the hair dark and slick.
notes: caterer -> unmasks as a Cleaner. Base: CONCIERGE (suited mesh).

instr: change the coveralls to a light-grey utility uniform with a bright safety-orange high-visibility vest across the chest and shoulders.
notes: dead-eyed meter reader; doubles as a Cleaner. Base: DIEGO (coveralls).

instr: change the coveralls to a faded tan mechanic jumpsuit; keep skin and hair the same.
change the windbreaker jacket to a bright turquoise athletic tank-top look and the pants to grey gym shorts.
notes: nasal gym-bro with permanent smoothie. Base: TYRELL (athletic).

instr: change the hoodie to a plain washed-out dark-grey hoodie and darken the whole outfit to a tired, colorless look; keep pants dark.
notes: weary Cleaners handler, hollow-eyed. Base: ALEX (hoodie).

instr: desaturate the ENTIRE character to a single monochrome pale ghostly grey-blue tone, removing all other color, like a faint glowing child spirit apparition.
notes: kid-safe nursery ghost, unharmable. Base: LEO (kid).
